PostToolUse.name: blog-post-created-reminder
PostToolUse.command:
echo '
✅ Blog post created! Preview it locally with:
   bundle exec jekyll serve
   Then visit: http://localhost:4000'

PreToolUse.name: protect-github-workflows
PreToolUse.command: echo '⚠️  WARNING: You are about to edit a GitHub Actions workflow file.' && echo 'These files control deployment and automation. Please confirm this is intentional.' && read -p 'Continue editing workflow? (y/n) ' confirm && [[ $confirm == 'y' ]]

PreToolUse.name: protect-config-files
PreToolUse.command: echo '⚠️  WARNING: You are about to edit _config.yml (Jekyll main config).' && echo 'Changes here affect the entire site build.' && read -p 'Continue? (y/n) ' confirm && [[ $confirm == 'y' ]]
